issue_statement: Engineering scaffold work still lacks one canonical result contract with explicit repeated-run behavior.
expected_outcome: SCE exposes one scaffold result contract with counts, workspace path, and overwrite policy.
impact_scope: engineering project scaffold feedback, setup reporting, later project bootstrap flows
reproduction_steps: Run or review current engineering scaffold behavior
Observe that one stable result contract is not yet defined
Observe that repeated-run setup outcome is not normalized into one contract
forbidden_workarounds: Do not redefine preview or open/import semantics in this spec
Do not hide repeated-run state behind silent success
